income_thresholds.description: Annual family income must be below Rs 5 lakh; white ration card holders are automatically eligible
income_thresholds.source: Telangana Aarogyasri Trust Guidelines / TS Government GO

exclusion_rules.description: Any family member paying income tax disqualifies the household
Only white ration card holders are eligible; families with other ration card types are excluded
Government employees covered under separate TS government health schemes are excluded
Families with employer-provided health insurance are excluded
Families with annual income exceeding Rs 5 lakh are excluded even if holding any ration card

family_criteria.family_definition: All members listed on the white ration card are covered. No cap on family size. Coverage is floater across all listed family members.

covered_procedures: Cardiology (bypass surgery, angioplasty, valve replacement, pacemaker implant)
Orthopedic (knee replacement, hip replacement, spinal surgery, fracture fixation)
Oncology (chemotherapy, radiation, surgical oncology, bone marrow transplant)
Neurosurgery (brain tumor, craniotomy, spinal cord procedures)
Diagnostics and lab tests during hospitalization
excluded_procedures: Alternative medicine (Ayurveda, Homeopathy) unless at empanelled hospital

required_documents.name: Aadhaar Card
required_documents.notes: Required for biometric/OTP-based e-KYC at empanelled hospital

required_documents.name: White Ration Card (Telangana)
alternatives: BPL Certificate issued by Telangana Revenue Department
required_documents.notes: Must be a valid white ration card issued by TS Civil Supplies department; primary eligibility document

required_documents.name: Aarogyasri Health Card
required_documents.notes: Previously issued Aarogyasri card; now Aadhaar-based verification is preferred

required_documents.name: Mobile Number
required_documents.notes: For OTP verification and scheme communication

required_documents.name: Address Proof
required_documents.notes: Telangana residency verification; white ration card usually serves this purpose

enrollment_steps: Step 1: Check eligibility via 104 helpline or visit Aarogyasri district office with white ration card
Step 2: Visit nearest Aarogyasri-empanelled hospital or district office with Aadhaar and white ration card
Step 3: Complete Aadhaar-based e-KYC (biometric or OTP verification)
Step 4: Hospital Aarogyasri coordinator verifies ration card details against TS Civil Supplies database
Step 5: Pre-authorization request submitted by hospital for the required procedure
Step 6: Aarogyasri Trust approves pre-authorization within 12-24 hours for listed procedures
Step 7: Cashless treatment at empanelled hospital under co-branded AB-PMJAY Rajiv Aarogyasri; coverage up to Rs 10 lakh per family per year
description_for_embedding: Rajiv Aarogyasri is Telangana's flagship state health insurance scheme providing Rs 10 lakh (Rs 1000000) per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization — one of the highest state-level coverages in India. The scheme is co-branded as AB-PMJAY Rajiv Aarogyasri, integrating both central and state benefits. It covers BPL families holding white ration cards with annual income below Rs 5 lakh across 1835 listed medical and surgical procedures including organ transplants. Beneficiaries receive cashless treatment at empanelled public and private hospitals across Telangana. Originally launched as Rajiv Aarogyasri in undivided AP, continued in Telangana post-bifurcation with enhanced coverage. Free for eligible families. Portal: rajivaarogyasri.telangana.gov.in.
